refsect1.title: GRN Change Restrictions
refsect1.para: For compliance reasons, moving a host to a different GRN is not allowed when the host archetype is configured to restrict grn changes, unless the host is in one of the build states listed in the configuration setting grn_change_restrictions.allow_host_build_status (almostready, blind, build, decommissioned), is being moved to/from a grn configured to allow grn changes in configuration setting grn_change_restrictions.allow_owner_eond_id, or is hosted in a model by a vendor exempted from grn change restrictions in the configuration setting grnchange_restrictions.allow_vendors.

In the case that the host inherits its owner GRN from its personality, moving the host to a different personality is not allowed where the GRN of the new personality is different than the GRN of the existing personality.
Exceptions for the above rules can be configured in the [grn_change_restrictions] section of the broker config file.
Where grn change restrictions apply, changing the host grn can only be done with a complete disk wipe.

example.title: Define archetype to which GRN change restrictions apply
Exempt hosts by vendors from GRN change restrictions
Exempt hosts being moved to/from GRN from GRN change restrictions
Exempt hosts in build states from GRN change restrictions
